LanguageData.ExtractorInvalidTarget: Pawn does not match the configured target criteria.
LanguageData.ExtractorNoRequiredOrgans: Pawn does not have the required organs for extraction.
LanguageData.PH_ComplexLooters_LetterText: Hunter scouts have been spotted near the ancient complex. They appear to be after supplies, not your people — for now.
LanguageData.PH_GiftPayment_LetterText_WithQualifying: The Pawn Hunters have accepted your delivery of {TOTAL} prisoner(s). {QUALIFYING} met their specimen criteria — their interest has been noted, and the next raid against you will be smaller. A payment of {TOTAL} dose(s) of drug medicine has arrived by drop pod.
LanguageData.PH_GiftPayment_LetterText_NoQualifying: The Pawn Hunters have accepted your delivery of {TOTAL} prisoner(s). None met their specimen criteria. A payment of {TOTAL} dose(s) of drug medicine has arrived by drop pod.
LanguageData.PH_AncientComplexFound_Desc: {0} has detected an ancient complex nearby. The glittertech sensors have pinpointed its location — but the strain on the components is beginning to show.
LanguageData.PH_ScannerNoSiteFound: The scanner could not find any viable site nearby.
LanguageData.PH_ScannerBurnedOutMsg: {0} has burned out after too many scans. The overloaded glittertech components are beyond repair.
LanguageData.PH_Settings_MinPawnsForBossRaid: Min. colonists for greatest hunter raid
